name: communication
description: Five composable communication skills for people who write for work: structure a written piece (BLUF, Minto Pyramid), edit for clarity and conciseness (active voice, hedge removal), align stakeholders (RFCs, proposals, decision docs with DACI/RAPID roles), apply documentation discipline (ADRs, runbooks, decision logs), and communicate visually (Mermaid flowcharts, sequence diagrams, C4, diagram-as-code).
